items.reasoning: Production hybrid retrieval + ranking shipped to 2M MAU, rigorous NDCG/MRR + A/B evaluation, strong corroborated Python, and genuinely available. One unsubstantiated LoRA claim recorded but down-weighted.
Built a recommendation system at a product company and has solid dense-retrieval experience, but evaluation rigor (offline-to-online) is thinner and recruiter responsiveness is moderate.
Strong Python and FastAPI backend with Elasticsearch search, but no embeddings/dense retrieval evidence — a material must-have gap for the ranking mandate.
Many AI keywords listed as skills, but career history is consulting-only (TCS) with no production deployment to real users — hits explicit JD red flags.
Perfect-on-paper retrieval skill list but hasn't logged in for 6 months and has a 5% recruiter response rate — effectively unavailable, so down-weighted heavily despite keyword match.
